mapper.select: SELECT MASTER_NO, GONGGO_NUM, GONGGO_NAME, GONGGO_ORG, NVL(INFO_NAME, '') AS INFO_NAME, NVL(INFO_DEPT, '') AS INFO_DEPT, NVL(INFO_POS, '') AS INFO_POS, NVL(INFO_ADDRESS,'') AS INFO_ADDRESS, NVL(INFO_TEL, '') AS INFO_TEL, NVL(INFO_HP, '') AS INFO_HP, NVL(INFO_FAX, '') AS INFO_FAX, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, INFO_ETC, BIZ_CONTENTS, BIZ_CONDITION, BIZ_COM, BIZ_MONEY, BIZ_METHOD, BIZ_DATE, WORK_PERIOD, POWER_VOLUME, HO_GISU, USE_DATE, START_DATE, ALL_MONEY, CONTRACT_DATE, DEMAND_DEPT, POWER_INFO, OIL_CON, OIL_DATE, OIL_CONDITION, OIL_MOVE, ORDER_COMPANY, ORDER_OWNER, ORDER_ADDR, ORDER_HOMPAGE, ORDER_TEL, ORDER_HP, ORDER_FAX, ORDER_DEPT, ORDER_POS, ORDER_NAME, PACT_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, TEASER_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_3, LOI_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_4, CA_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_5, APPROVAL_LINK, AMT_UNIT, POWER_UNIT FROM S1010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, INFO_SUMMARY, BASIC_TOTAL_SUM, BIZ_TRUST_SCORE, BIZ_POSS_SCORE, BIZ_CHECK_SCORE, BIZ_RATIO_SCORE, TOTAL_SELECT, TOTAL_TXT, BASIC_RE_LINK, BASIC_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, S2_STATE, S2_REGI_DATE, S2_UPDATE_DATE, S2_FINISH_DATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, TRUST_SCORE, TRUST_SCORE_SUM, POSS_SCORE, POSS_SCORE_SUM, SUM_RATIO, APPROVAL_LINK, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MIKEP_STATE, MIKEP_STATE1, APPROVAL_LINK1, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, MIKEP_DOC_NO FROM S2010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, BIZ_SUMMARY, REPORT_METHOD, REPORT_CONTENTS, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, BIZ_STATE, BIZ_REGI_DATE, BIZ_UPDATE_DATE, BIZ_FINISH_DATE, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, BIZ_RESULT_SUMMARY, BIZ_CON_RESULT, RESULT_STATE, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_UPDATE_DATE, RESULT_APP_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, PRO_SUMMARY, PRO_STATE, PRO_REGI_DATE, PRO_UPDATE_DATE, PRO_FINISH_DATE, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, RISK_CHEK_METHOD, CHECK_METHOD, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, MIKEP_STATE, MIKEP_STATE1, MIKEP_STATE2, APPROVAL_LINK1, APPROVAL_LINK2, MIKEP_DOC_NO, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM S3010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, BIZ_REASON, BIZ_SCORE, APPRAISAL_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, BIZ_CHECK_SCORE, BIZ_RATIO_SCORE, BIZ_SUM, APPRAISAL_LINK, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, S4_STATE, S4_REGI_DATE, S4_UPDATE_DATE, S4_FINISH_DATE, PRO_STATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MIKEP_DOC_NO, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM S4010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, SELECT_SUMMARY, SELECT_METHOD, SELECT_CONTENTS, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, SELECT_STATE, SELECT_REGI_DATE, SELECT_UPDATE_DATE, SELECT_FINISH_DATE, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, RESULT_SUMMARY, CONV_RESULT, RESULT_STATE, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_UPDATE_DATE, RESULT_APP_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, PRO_STATE, CHECK_METHOD, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, APPROVAL_LINK, APPROVAL_LINK1, APPROVAL_LINK2, MIKEP_STATE, MIKEP_STATE1, MIKEP_STATE2, MIKEP_DOC_NO, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM S5010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, TF_SUMMARY, REPORT_METHOD, REPORT_CONTENTS, BIZ_SUMMARY, TF_STATE, TF_REGI_DATE, TF_UPDATE_DATE, TF_FINISH_DATE, BIZ_STATE, BIZ_REGI_DATE, BIZ_UPDATE_DATE, BIZ_FINISH_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, MIKEP_STATE1, APPROVAL_LINK1, MIKEP_STATE2, APPROVAL_LINK2, MIKEP_DOC_NO, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D1010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, D2_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, D2_STATE, D2_REGI_DATE, D2_UPDATE_DATE, D2_FINISH_DATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MIKEP_DOC_NO, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D2010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, RISK_SUMMARY, RISK_METHOD, RISK_CONTENTS, RISK_STATE, RISK_REGI_DATE, RISK_UPDATE_DATE, RISK_FINISH_DATE, RISK_RESULT_SUMMARY, RISK_SUM, STANDARD_RATE, RISK_MEET_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, RESULT_STATE, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_UPDATE_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, PRO_STATE, RISK_CHECK_METHOD, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, APPROVAL_LINK1, APPROVAL_LINK2, MIKEP_STATE1, MIKEP_STATE2, MIKEP_DOC_NO, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D3010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, RISK_MANAGER_SUMMARY, RISK_MANAGER_METHOD, RISK_MANAGER_CONTENTS, RISK_MANAGER_STATE, RISK_MANAGER_REGI_DATE, RISK_MANAGER_UPDATE_DATE, RISK_MANAGER_FINISH_DATE, MANAGER_RESULT_SUMMARY, MANAGER_APP_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, MANAGER_STATE, MANAGER_REGI_DATE, MANAGER_UPDATE_DATE, APPROVAL_REGI_DATE, APPROVAL_FINISH_DATE, APPROVAL_LINK, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, CHECK_METHOD, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MIKEP_STATE, MIKEP_STATE1, MIKEP_STATE2, MIKEP_DOC_NO, APPROVAL_LINK1, APPROVAL_LINK2, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D3020 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, TENDER_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, TENDER_REGI_DATE, TENDER_UPDATE_DATE, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, TENDER_STATE, SUBMIT_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, SUBMIT_REGI_DATE, SUBMIT_UPDATE_DATE, SUBMIT_FINISH_DATE, SUBMIT_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MIKEP_STATE, MIKEP_STATE1, APPROVAL_LINK1, MIKEP_STATE2, APPROVAL_LINK2, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, MIKEP_DOC_NO, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D4010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, MANAGER_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, MANAGER_REGI_DATE, MANAGER_UPDATE_DATE, MANAGER_STATE, MANAGER_FINISH_DATE, SUCCESS_SUMMARY, SUCCESS_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, SUCCESS_REGI_DATE, SUCCESS_UPDATE_DATE, SUCCESS_FINISH_DATE, SUCCESS_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MIKEP_STATE1, APPROVAL_LINK1, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, MIKEP_DOC_NO, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D5010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, MANAGER_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, MANAGER_REGI_DATE, MANAGER_UPDATE_DATE, MANAGER_STATE, MANAGER_FINISH_DATE, SUBMIT_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, SUBMIT_REGI_DATE, SUBMIT_UPDATE_DATE, SUBMIT_FINISH_DATE, SUBMIT_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MIKEP_STATE1, APPROVAL_LINK1, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, MIKEP_DOC_NO, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D6010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}

SELECT MASTER_NO, CONTRACT_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, CONTRACT_STATE, CONTRACT_REGI_DATE, CONTRACT_UPDATE_DATE, CONTRACT_FINISH_DATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MIKEP_DOC_NO, MIKEP_DEL_STATE, APPROVAL_DEL_LINK, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID FROM D7010 WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
SELECT MASTER_NO, ORDER_NO, COMPANY_NAME, CEO_NAME, COM_ADDR, COM_HOMEPAGE, COM_TEL, COM_HP, COM_FAX, BIZ_FIELD, BIZ_STAKE FROM S1010_CONSORTIUM WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} ORDER BY ORDER_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO S1010 ( MASTER_NO, GONGGO_NUM, GONGGO_NAME, GONGGO_ORG, INFO_NAME, INFO_ADDRESS, INFO_TEL, INFO_HP, INFO_FAX, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, INFO_ETC, BIZ_CONTENTS, BIZ_WORK, BIZ_MONEY, BIZ_DATE, ORDER_COMPANY, ORDER_OWNER, ORDER_ADDR, ORDER_HOMPAGE, ORDER_DEPT, ORDER_POS, ORDER_NAME, ORDER_TEL, ORDER_HP, ORDER_FAX, BIZ_METHOD, POWER_VOLUME, HO_GISU, WORK_PERIOD, BIZ_COM, USE_DATE, START_DATE, ALL_MONEY, CONTRACT_DATE, DEMAND_DEPT, POWER_INFO, OIL_CON, OIL_DATE, OIL_CONDITION, OIL_MOVE, PACT_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, TEASER_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_3, LOI_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_4, PRO_STATE, REGI_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, FINISH_DATE, CA_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_5, APPROVAL_LINK, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, S1_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MINE_STATE, MINE_MASTER, MINE_TOTAL, MINE_OUTPUT, MINE_STANDARD, MINE_PORT, MINE_DEV, PRECOD, POSTCOD, MIKEP_STATE, INFO_DEPT, INFO_POS, MIKEP_STATE1, APPROVAL_LINK1, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, MIKEP_DOC_NO, BIZ_CONDITION, AMT_UNIT, POWER_UNIT ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{gonggoNum}, #{gonggoName}, #{gonggoOrg}, #{infoName}, #{infoAddress}, #{infoTel}, #{infoHp}, #{infoFax}, #{attachFileSeq1}, #{infoEtc}, #{bizContents}, #{bizWork}, #{bizMoney}, #{bizDate}, #{orderCompany}, #{orderOwner}, #{orderAddr}, #{orderHompage}, #{orderDept}, #{orderPos}, #{orderName}, #{orderTel}, #{orderHp}, #{orderFax}, #{bizMethod}, #{powerVolume}, #{hoGisu}, #{workPeriod}, #{bizCom}, #{useDate}, #{startDate}, #{allMoney}, #{contractDate}, #{demandDept}, #{powerInfo}, #{oilCon}, #{oilDate}, #{oilCondition}, #{oilMove}, #{pactSelect}, #{attachFileSeq2}, #{teaserSelect}, #{attachFileSeq3}, #{loiSelect}, #{attachFileSeq4}, #{proState}, SYSDATE, #{updateDate}, #{finishDate}, #{caSelect}, #{attachFileSeq5}, #{approvalLink}, #{resultRegiDate}, #{resultFinishDate}, #{s1State}, #{bizOmitReason}, #{mineState}, #{mineMaster}, #{mineTotal}, #{mineOutput}, #{mineStandard}, #{minePort}, #{mineDev}, #{precod}, #{postcod}, #{mikepState}, #{infoDept}, #{infoPos}, #{mikepState1}, #{approvalLink1}, #{inwriterId}, #{upwriterId}, #{mikepDocNo}, #{bizCondition}, #{amtUnit}, #{powerUnit} )
mapper.update: UPDATE S1010 SET GONGGO_NUM = #{gonggoNum}, GONGGO_NAME = #{gonggoName}, GONGGO_ORG = #{gonggoOrg}, INFO_NAME = #{infoName}, INFO_ADDRESS = #{infoAddress}, INFO_TEL = #{infoTel}, INFO_HP = #{infoHp}, INFO_FAX = #{infoFax}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1 = #{attachFileSeq1}, INFO_ETC = #{infoEtc}, BIZ_CONTENTS = #{bizContents}, BIZ_WORK = #{bizWork}, BIZ_MONEY = #{bizMoney}, BIZ_DATE = #{bizDate}, ORDER_COMPANY = #{orderCompany}, ORDER_OWNER = #{orderOwner}, ORDER_ADDR = #{orderAddr}, ORDER_HOMPAGE = #{orderHompage}, ORDER_DEPT = #{orderDept}, ORDER_POS = #{orderPos}, ORDER_NAME = #{orderName}, ORDER_TEL = #{orderTel}, ORDER_HP = #{orderHp}, ORDER_FAX = #{orderFax}, BIZ_METHOD = #{bizMethod}, POWER_VOLUME = #{powerVolume}, HO_GISU = #{hoGisu}, WORK_PERIOD = #{workPeriod}, BIZ_COM = #{bizCom}, CONTRACT_DATE = #{contractDate}, DEMAND_DEPT = #{demandDept}, POWER_INFO = #{powerInfo}, OIL_CON = #{oilCon}, OIL_DATE = #{oilDate}, OIL_CONDITION = #{oilCondition}, OIL_MOVE = #{oilMove}, PACT_SELECT = #{pactSelect}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2 = #{attachFileSeq2}, TEASER_SELECT = #{teaserSelect}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_3 = #{attachFileSeq3}, LOI_SELECT = #{loiSelect}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_4 = #{attachFileSeq4}, CA_SELECT = #{caSelect}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_5 = #{attachFileSeq5}, INFO_DEPT = #{infoDept}, INFO_POS = #{infoPos}, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId}, BIZ_CONDITION = #{bizCondition}, AMT_UNIT = #{amtUnit}, POWER_UNIT = #{powerUnit}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO S1010_HISTORY ( MASTER_NO, VERSION, GONGGO_NUM, GONGGO_NAME, GONGGO_ORG, INFO_NAME, INFO_ADDRESS, INFO_TEL, INFO_HP, INFO_FAX, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, INFO_ETC, BIZ_CONTENTS, BIZ_WORK, BIZ_MONEY, BIZ_DATE, ORDER_COMPANY, ORDER_OWNER, ORDER_ADDR, ORDER_HOMPAGE, ORDER_DEPT, ORDER_POS, ORDER_NAME, ORDER_TEL, ORDER_HP, ORDER_FAX, BIZ_METHOD, POWER_VOLUME, HO_GISU, WORK_PERIOD, BIZ_COM, USE_DATE, START_DATE, ALL_MONEY, CONTRACT_DATE, DEMAND_DEPT, POWER_INFO, OIL_CON, OIL_DATE, OIL_CONDITION, OIL_MOVE, PACT_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, TEASER_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_3, LOI_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_4, PRO_STATE, REGI_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, FINISH_DATE, CA_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_5, APPROVAL_LINK, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, S1_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MINE_STATE, MINE_MASTER, MINE_TOTAL, MINE_OUTPUT, MINE_STANDARD, MINE_PORT, MINE_DEV, PRECOD, POSTCOD, MIKEP_STATE, INFO_DEPT, INFO_POS, MIKEP_STATE1, APPROVAL_LINK1, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, MIKEP_DOC_NO, BIZ_CONDITION, AMT_UNIT, POWER_UNIT ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{version}, #{gonggoNum}, #{gonggoName}, #{gonggoOrg}, #{infoName}, #{infoAddress}, #{infoTel}, #{infoHp}, #{infoFax}, #{attachFileSeq1}, #{infoEtc}, #{bizContents}, #{bizWork}, #{bizMoney}, #{bizDate}, #{orderCompany}, #{orderOwner}, #{orderAddr}, #{orderHompage}, #{orderDept}, #{orderPos}, #{orderName}, #{orderTel}, #{orderHp}, #{orderFax}, #{bizMethod}, #{powerVolume}, #{hoGisu}, #{workPeriod}, #{bizCom}, #{useDate}, #{startDate}, #{allMoney}, #{contractDate}, #{demandDept}, #{powerInfo}, #{oilCon}, #{oilDate}, #{oilCondition}, #{oilMove}, #{pactSelect}, #{attachFileSeq2}, #{teaserSelect}, #{attachFileSeq3}, #{loiSelect}, #{attachFileSeq4}, #{proState}, SYSDATE, #{updateDate}, #{finishDate}, #{caSelect}, #{attachFileSeq5}, #{approvalLink}, #{resultRegiDate}, #{resultFinishDate}, #{s1State}, #{bizOmitReason}, #{mineState}, #{mineMaster}, #{mineTotal}, #{mineOutput}, #{mineStandard}, #{minePort}, #{mineDev}, #{precod}, #{postcod}, #{mikepState}, #{infoDept}, #{infoPos}, #{mikepState1}, #{approvalLink1}, #{inwriterId}, #{upwriterId}, #{mikepDocNo}, #{bizCondition}, #{amtUnit}, #{powerUnit} )

INSERT INTO S2010 ( MASTER_NO, INFO_SUMMARY, BASIC_TOTAL_SUM, BIZ_TRUST_SCORE, BIZ_POSS_SCORE, BIZ_CHECK_SCORE, BIZ_RATIO_SCORE, TOTAL_SELECT, TOTAL_TXT, BASIC_RE_LINK, BASIC_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, S2_STATE, PRO_STATE, TRUST_SCORE, TRUST_SCORE_SUM, POSS_SCORE, POSS_SCORE_SUM, SUM_RATIO, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, S2_REGI_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{infoSummary}, #{basicTotalSum}, #{bizTrustScore}, #{bizPossScore}, #{bizCheckScore}, #{bizRatioScore}, #{totalSelect}, #{totalTxt}, #{basicReLink}, #{basicResult}, #{attachFileSeq}, #{s2State}, #{proState}, #{trustScore}, #{trustScoreSum}, #{possScore}, #{possScoreSum}, #{sumRatio}, #{inwriterId}, #{upwriterId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE S2010 SET INFO_SUMMARY = #{infoSummary}, BASIC_TOTAL_SUM = #{basicTotalSum}, BIZ_TRUST_SCORE = #{bizTrustScore}, BIZ_POSS_SCORE = #{bizPossScore}, BIZ_CHECK_SCORE = #{bizCheckScore}, BIZ_RATIO_SCORE = #{bizRatioScore}, TOTAL_SELECT = #{totalSelect}, TOTAL_TXT = #{totalTxt}, BASIC_RE_LINK = #{basicReLink}, BASIC_RESULT = #{basicResult}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ = #{attachFileSeq}, S2_STATE = #{s2State}, PRO_STATE = #{proState}, TRUST_SCORE = #{trustScore}, TRUST_SCORE_SUM = #{trustScoreSum}, POSS_SCORE = #{possScore}, POSS_SCORE_SUM = #{possScoreSum}, SUM_RATIO = #{sumRatio}, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId}, S2_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO S3010 ( MASTER_NO, BIZ_SUMMARY, REPORT_METHOD, REPORT_CONTENTS, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, BIZ_RESULT_SUMMARY, BIZ_CON_RESULT, RESULT_STATE, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, APPROVAL_LINK2, PRO_SUMMARY, RISK_CHEK_METHOD, CHECK_METHOD, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, BIZ_REGI_DATE, BIZ_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.bizSummary}, #{bizInfo.reportMethod}, #{bizInfo.reportContents}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.approvalLink}, #{bizInfo.bizResultSummary}, #{bizInfo.bizConResult}, #{bizInfo.resultState}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.approvalLink2}, #{bizInfo.proSummary}, #{bizInfo.riskChekMethod}, #{bizInfo.checkMethod}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO S4010 ( MASTER_NO, BIZ_REASON, BIZ_SCORE, APPRAISAL_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, S4_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, APPRAISAL_LINK, BIZ_CHECK_SCORE, BIZ_RATIO_SCORE, BIZ_SUM, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, MIKEP_DOC_NO, S4_REGI_DATE, S4_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizReason}, #{bizScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appraisalResult}, #{attachFileSeq}, #{s4State}, #{proState}, #{bizOmitReason}, #{appraisalLink}, #{bizCheckScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizRatioScore,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizSum}, #{inwriterId}, #{upwriterId}, #{mikepDocNo}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO S5010 ( MASTER_NO, SELECT_SUMMARY, SELECT_METHOD, SELECT_CONTENTS, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, RESULT_SUMMARY, CONV_RESULT, RESULT_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, CHECK_METHOD, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, SELECT_REGI_DATE, SELECT_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.selectSummary}, #{bizInfo.selectMethod}, #{bizInfo.selectContents}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.resultSummary}, #{bizInfo.convResult}, #{bizInfo.resultState}, #{bizInfo.proState}, #{bizInfo.bizOmitReason}, #{bizInfo.meetingTime}, #{bizInfo.meetingPlace}, #{bizInfo.checkMethod}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO D1010 ( MASTER_NO, TF_SUMMARY, REPORT_METHOD, REPORT_CONTENTS, BIZ_SUMMARY, TF_STATE, BIZ_STATE, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, TF_REGI_DATE, TF_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.tfSummary}, #{bizInfo.reportMethod}, #{bizInfo.reportContents}, #{bizInfo.bizSummary}, #{bizInfo.tfState}, #{bizInfo.bizState}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.proState}, #{bizInfo.bizOmitReason}, #{bizInfo.meetingTime}, #{bizInfo.meetingPlace}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO D2010 ( MASTER_NO, D2_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, D2_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, D2_REGI_DATE, D2_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{d2Summary}, #{attachFileSeq}, #{d2State}, #{proState}, #{bizOmitReason}, #{inwriterId}, #{upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE D2010 SET D2_SUMMARY = #{d2Summary}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ = #{attachFileSeq}, D2_STATE = #{d2State}, PRO_STATE = #{proState}, BIZ_OMIT_REASON = #{bizOmitReason}, MIKEP_DOC_NO = #{mikepDocNo}, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId}, D2_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO D3010 ( MASTER_NO, RISK_SUMMARY, RISK_METHOD, RISK_CONTENTS, RISK_STATE, RISK_RESULT_SUMMARY, RISK_SUM, STANDARD_RATE, RISK_MEET_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, RESULT_STATE, PRO_STATE, RISK_CHECK_METHOD, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, RISK_REGI_DATE, RISK_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.riskSummary}, #{bizInfo.riskMethod}, #{bizInfo.riskContents}, #{bizInfo.riskState}, #{bizInfo.riskResultSummary}, #{bizInfo.riskSum}, #{bizInfo.standardRate}, #{bizInfo.riskMeetResult}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.resultState}, #{bizInfo.proState}, #{bizInfo.riskCheckMethod}, #{bizInfo.bizOmitReason}, #{bizInfo.meetingTime}, #{bizInfo.meetingPlace}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO D3020 ( MASTER_NO, RISK_MANAGER_SUMMARY, RISK_MANAGER_METHOD, RISK_MANAGER_CONTENTS, RISK_MANAGER_STATE, MANAGER_RESULT_SUMMARY, MANAGER_APP_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, MANAGER_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, MEETING_TIME, MEETING_PLACE, CHECK_METHOD, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, RISK_MANAGER_REGI_DATE, RISK_MANAGER_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.riskManagerSummary}, #{bizInfo.riskManagerMethod}, #{bizInfo.riskManagerContents}, #{bizInfo.riskManagerState}, #{bizInfo.managerResultSummary}, #{bizInfo.managerAppResult}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.managerState}, #{bizInfo.proState}, #{bizInfo.bizOmitReason}, #{bizInfo.meetingTime}, #{bizInfo.meetingPlace}, #{bizInfo.checkMethod}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO D4010 ( MASTER_NO, TENDER_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, TENDER_STATE, SUBMIT_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, SUBMIT_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, TENDER_REGI_DATE, TENDER_UPDATE_DATE, SUBMIT_REGI_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.tenderSummary}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.approvalLink}, #{bizInfo.tenderState}, #{bizInfo.submitSummary}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.submitState}, #{bizInfo.proState}, #{bizInfo.bizOmitReason}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO D5010 ( MASTER_NO, MANAGER_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, MANAGER_STATE, SUCCESS_SUMMARY, SUCCESS_RESULT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, SUCCESS_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, MANAGER_REGI_DATE, MANAGER_UPDATE_DATE, SUCCESS_REGI_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.managerSummary}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.approvalLink}, #{bizInfo.managerState}, #{bizInfo.successSummary}, #{bizInfo.successResult}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.successState}, #{bizInfo.proState}, #{bizInfo.bizOmitReason}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO D6010 ( MASTER_NO, MANAGER_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, APPROVAL_LINK, MANAGER_STATE, SUBMIT_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, SUBMIT_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, MANAGER_REGI_DATE, MANAGER_UPDATE_DATE, SUBMIT_REGI_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{bizInfo.managerSummary}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq1}, #{bizInfo.approvalLink}, #{bizInfo.managerState}, #{bizInfo.submitSummary}, #{bizInfo.attachFileSeq2}, #{bizInfo.submitState}, #{bizInfo.proState}, #{bizInfo.bizOmitReason}, #{bizInfo.inwriterId}, #{bizInfo.upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO D7010 ( MASTER_NO, CONTRACT_SUMMARY, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, CONTRACT_STATE, PRO_STATE, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, CONTRACT_REGI_DATE, CONTRACT_UPDATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{masterNo}, #{contractSummary}, #{attachFileSeq}, #{contractState}, #{proState}, #{bizOmitReason}, #{inwriterId}, #{upwriterId}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE D7010 SET CONTRACT_SUMMARY = #{contractSummary}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ = #{attachFileSeq}, CONTRACT_STATE = #{contractState}, PRO_STATE = #{proState}, BIZ_OMIT_REASON = #{bizOmitReason}, MIKEP_DOC_NO = #{mikepDocNo}, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId}, CONTRACT_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo}
mapper.select: SELECT MASTER_NO, VERSION, GONGGO_NUM, GONGGO_NAME, GONGGO_ORG, NVL(INFO_NAME, '') AS INFO_NAME, NVL(INFO_DEPT, '') AS INFO_DEPT, NVL(INFO_POS, '') AS INFO_POS, NVL(INFO_ADDRESS,'') AS INFO_ADDRESS, NVL(INFO_TEL, '') AS INFO_TEL, NVL(INFO_HP, '') AS INFO_HP, NVL(INFO_FAX, '') AS INFO_FAX, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_1, INFO_ETC, BIZ_CONTENTS, BIZ_WORK, BIZ_MONEY, BIZ_DATE, BIZ_METHOD, BIZ_CONDITION, BIZ_COM, BIZ_OMIT_REASON, ORDER_COMPANY, ORDER_OWNER, ORDER_ADDR, ORDER_HOMPAGE, ORDER_DEPT, ORDER_POS, ORDER_NAME, ORDER_TEL, ORDER_HP, ORDER_FAX, POWER_VOLUME, HO_GISU, WORK_PERIOD, USE_DATE, START_DATE, ALL_MONEY, CONTRACT_DATE, DEMAND_DEPT, POWER_INFO, OIL_CON, OIL_DATE, OIL_CONDITION, OIL_MOVE, PACT_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_2, TEASER_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_3, LOI_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_4, CA_SELECT, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ_5, PRO_STATE, S1_STATE, REGI_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, FINISH_DATE, APPROVAL_LINK, APPROVAL_LINK1, RESULT_REGI_DATE, RESULT_FINISH_DATE, MINE_STATE, MINE_MASTER, MINE_TOTAL, MINE_OUTPUT, MINE_STANDARD, MINE_PORT, MINE_DEV, PRECOD, POSTCOD, VERSION_UPDATE_DATE, VERSION_UPDATE_USERID, VERSION_UPDATE_NAME, UPDATE_CONTENTS, MIKEP_STATE, MIKEP_STATE1, MIKEP_DOC_NO, INWRITER_ID, UPWRITER_ID, AMT_UNIT, POWER_UNIT FROM S1010_HISTORY WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND VERSION = #{version}

SELECT MASTER_NO, ORDER_NO, VERSION, COMPANY_NAME, CEO_NAME, COM_ADDR, COM_HOMEPAGE, COM_TEL, COM_HP, COM_FAX, BIZ_FIELD, BIZ_STAKE, VERSION_UPDATE_DATE, VERSION_UPDATE_USERID, VERSION_UPDATE_NAME FROM S1010_CONSORTIUM_HISTORY WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND VERSION = #{version} ORDER BY ORDER_NO
SELECT EMPNO, EMP_NAME, BNO FROM BIZ_MEMBER WHERE MASTER_NO = #{masterNo} AND PRO_STEP = 'S10' ORDER BY BNO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BIZ_MEMBER (MASTER_NO, EMPNO, PRO_STEP, BNO, USE_YN, REGI_DATE, EMP_NAME) VALUES (#{masterNo}, #{empno}, #{proStep}, #{bno}, 'Y', SYSDATE, #{empName})
